Meta.title: Apion — Technology solutions for growing businesses
Meta.description: Apion is an Amsterdam-based technology company. We build websites, SaaS applications, and solve technical problems for small and growing businesses.

hero.title: Technology solutions for growing businesses
hero.subtitle: We build modern websites, deliver SaaS applications, and solve the technical problems that hold small businesses back.

services.title: Services built around your business
services.subtitle: From a fast new website to a custom SaaS platform — we cover the full stack so you can focus on growth.

projects.title: Recent projects
projects.subtitle: A look at recent collaborations with our clients.

cta.title: Let's build something together
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your business and the problem you want to solve. We'll respond within one business day.

web.title: Website design & development
web.description: Modern, fast, accessible websites built with the latest tech stack. Perfect for small businesses ready to look the part.

saas.title: Custom SaaS applications
saas.description: From idea to production. We design, build, and deploy SaaS products tailored to your business workflows.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & support
maintenance.description: Keep your website running smoothly. Updates, bug fixes, monitoring, and ongoing improvements.

seo.title: SEO & performance
seo.description: Rank higher and load faster. We optimize your website's structure, speed, and search engine visibility.

database.title: Database optimization
database.description: Slow queries? Bloated schema? We restructure and tune your database so your app stays fast as you grow.

consulting.title: Technology consulting
consulting.description: Not sure which stack to choose, or how to scale? Get clear, practical guidance from senior engineers.

hero.title: We're a small tech team with a big toolbox
hero.subtitle: Based in Amsterdam, we help small and growing businesses ship better technology — without the overhead of a big agency.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: We believe great technology shouldn't be reserved for big enterprises. We build modern, well-engineered websites and SaaS applications for the businesses that often get left behind by traditional agencies.

listen.title: Listen first
listen.body: We start every project by understanding your business and the problem you're trying to solve — not by pitching a stack.

ship.title: Ship fast
ship.body: Modern tooling and senior engineers mean we get to a working product in weeks, not quarters.

stay.title: Stay close
stay.body: We don't disappear after launch. Maintenance, performance, and SEO are an ongoing partnership.

hq.title: Based in Amsterdam, working globally
hq.body: Our headquarters is in Amsterdam, but we work with clients across Europe, the Middle East, and beyond. We deliver in English, Dutch, Ukrainian, and Arabic.

hero.title: Everything you need to ship and grow
hero.subtitle: From building your first website to scaling a SaaS — we cover the work, you focus on the business.

hero.title: Projects we've built for our clients
hero.subtitle: Real businesses, real outcomes. Here's what we've shipped recently.

hero.title: Let's talk about your project
hero.subtitle: Tell us a bit about your business and what you'd like to build. We'll get back to you within one business day.

form.name: Your name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project, the problem you'd like to solve, or any questions.
form.successBody: Thanks — we'll get back to you within one business day.
form.errorBody: Please try again, or email us directly.

Newsletter.title: Get our quarterly insights
Newsletter.body: Practical engineering and SaaS notes — four times a year, no spam.
Newsletter.successBody: Thanks — check your inbox for confirmation.

Trust.label: Tools and platforms we build with

Capabilities.title: Modern engineering, end to end
Capabilities.subtitle: We build on a fast, type-safe, edge-ready stack — so your product stays cheap to run and easy to extend.

fullstack.title: Full-stack TypeScript
fullstack.body: One language from database to UI. Fewer bugs, faster reviews, easier handover.

edge.title: Edge-ready performance
edge.body: Servers close to your users. Fast first paint, fast everywhere.

i18n.title: Multilingual by default
i18n.body: Built for global audiences from day one — including right-to-left languages.

observability.title: Observability built-in
observability.body: Errors, performance, and uptime tracked from launch — no guessing what's wrong.

security.title: Security & privacy first
security.body: GDPR-aware, secure by default, audited dependencies, principle of least privilege.

ownership.title: You own everything
ownership.body: Source, infrastructure, accounts — all transferred at delivery. No vendor lock-in.

Stats.title: A small team, real outcomes
Stats.subtitle: Numbers our clients see in the first 90 days.

Process.title: From first call to ongoing partnership
Process.subtitle: A clear, predictable engagement so you always know where things stand.

discover.title: Discovery
discover.body: We listen to your business and understand the real problem before talking technology.

design.title: Design & scope
design.body: We propose a clear plan with timeline, milestones, and a fixed quote.

build.title: Build & ship
build.body: We build in short sprints with weekly demos. You see progress every week.

support.title: Support & grow
support.body: After launch we keep your product fast, secure, and improving — as a long-term partner.

anna.quote: Apion took our outdated WordPress site and turned it into something we're proud to share. Sales are up, our shop is fast, and they actually answer the phone.
anna.name: Anna van der Berg

olena.quote: We needed a patient portal that worked across multiple clinics in two languages. The team understood healthcare constraints and shipped a product our staff and patients actually use.
olena.name: Olena Tkachuk

mark.quote: Our dashboard used to take 30 seconds to load. Apion rebuilt the data layer and now it's under a second. They left our team smarter for it.
mark.name: Mark de Vries

pricing.q: How do you price your work?
pricing.a: Most engagements are a fixed quote per phase, agreed before we start. For ongoing work we offer monthly retainers with clear scope. We share the full quote up front — no hourly billing surprises.

timeline.q: How long does a typical project take?
timeline.a: A new marketing website typically ships in 3–5 weeks. Custom SaaS applications start at 8–12 weeks for an MVP. We share a precise timeline after the discovery call.

languages.q: Which languages do you work in?
languages.a: We deliver in English, Dutch, Ukrainian, and Arabic. Project meetings can run in any of these — pick whichever is easiest for your team.

ownership.q: Who owns the code we pay for?
ownership.a: You do, fully. We hand over the repository, infrastructure, and credentials. No vendor lock-in. We use widely-supported open-source tools so any developer can pick it up.

stack.a: We pick the best tool per project, but the default stack is Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Supabase / Postgres, and Drizzle. Hosted on Vercel or your provider of choice.

support.q: Do you offer ongoing support after launch?
support.a: Yes. Most clients keep us on a monthly retainer for maintenance, performance, and feature work. We respond within one business day.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how Apion collects, uses, and protects information when you visit this website or engage our services.

contact.title: Contact form data
contact.body: When you fill in the contact form, we store your name, email, company (if provided), and message in our database in order to respond to your inquiry. We do not share this with third parties.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: We use privacy-respecting analytics to understand which pages are useful. We do not track you across other sites.

rights.title: Your rights (GDPR)
rights.body: You may request a copy of your data, ask us to correct it, or have it deleted at any time. Contact us via the form to exercise these rights.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the Apion website and any services delivered.

scope.title: Scope of services
scope.body: Project scope, deliverables, timeline, and pricing are agreed in writing before any work begins. Anything outside that scope is treated as a separate engagement.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: On full payment, all custom code, designs, and content produced for your project are transferred to you. We retain the right to reference the work in our portfolio.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: Apion's liability is limited to the fees paid for the specific engagement. We carry professional indemnity insurance for material work.

NotFound.title: Lost in the stack
NotFound.subtitle: We couldn't find that page. It might have moved, or it may never have existed.

Cookies.title: We use cookies
Cookies.body: We use essential cookies to make this site work and (with your consent) anonymous analytics to improve it. You can change your choice any time.
